groups.name: spring.ai.agents
groups.description: Configuration for the Spring AI Agents multi-agent orchestration framework.

groups.name: spring.ai.agents.observability
groups.description: Observability settings: metrics and event emission.

properties.name: spring.ai.agents.default-error-policy
properties.description: Default ErrorPolicy applied when a graph does not specify one.

properties.name: spring.ai.agents.observability.metrics
properties.description: Register a MicrometerAgentListener when a MeterRegistry is present.

properties.name: spring.ai.agents.squad.default-routing-strategy
properties.description: Default strategy injected as a RoutingStrategy bean when no user-defined one is present.

values.description: Propagate the first error and stop the graph.
Retry the failing node once, then fail.
Log the error, skip the node, continue via outgoing edges.
Always route to the first registered executor.
Ask the LLM to pick an executor name (requires a ChatClient bean).
